channel.title: Payload-Processing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Payload-Processing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Announcing the AI Gateway Working Group
item.description:
Kubernetes has formed a new AI Gateway Working Group to define standards and best practices for Gateway API-based networking infrastructure tailored to AI workloads.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog
